name: Weak Password Recovery Mechanism for Forgotten Password
description: The product contains a mechanism for users to recover or reset forgotten passwords, but that mechanism is weak. Weaknesses include easily guessable security questions, sending passwords to incorrect email addresses, lack of rate limiting on reset attempts, or revealing original passwords instead of generating temporary ones.
detection_pattern: AUTH node implementing password recovery accepts INGRESS input (security answers, reset tokens) with insufficient CONTROL validation. Look for recovery flows that lack rate limiting, use weak verification questions, expose original passwords, or send credentials over insecure EGRESS channels.
